mapper.sql: id, test_plan_id, case_id, project_id, case_source_type, modification_cost_ms, saved_write_ms, exec_count, first_exec_time, first_exec_result, last_exec_result, is_blocked_run, block_reason, snapshot_cs_score, snapshot_level, create_time, update_time, actual_exec_ms, actual_reading_ms, is_batch_fill, focus_out_count, filtered_time_ms, total_time_ms
mapper.insert: insert into spotter_efficiency.test_plan_case_metrics (id, test_plan_id, case_id, project_id, case_source_type, modification_cost_ms, saved_write_ms, exec_count, first_exec_time, first_exec_result, last_exec_result, is_blocked_run, block_reason, snapshot_cs_score, snapshot_level, create_time, update_time, actual_exec_ms, actual_reading_ms, is_batch_fill, focus_out_count, filtered_time_ms, total_time_ms ) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{testPlanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caseSourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modificationCostMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{savedWriteMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{execCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{firstExecTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{firstExecResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastExecResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isBlockedRun,jdbcType=BIT}, #{blockReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{snapshotCsScore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{snapshotLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{actualExecMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{actualReadingMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isBatchFill,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{focusOutCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{filteredTimeMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{totalTimeMs,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
mapper.update: update spotter_efficiency.test_plan_case_metrics set test_plan_id = #{testPlanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, case_id = #{caseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_id = #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, case_source_type = #{caseSourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modification_cost_ms = #{modificationCostMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, saved_write_ms = #{savedWriteMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, exec_count = #{execCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, first_exec_time = #{firstExecTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, first_exec_result = #{firstExecResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_exec_result = #{lastExecResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_blocked_run = #{isBlockedRun,jdbcType=BIT}, block_reason = #{blockReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, snapshot_cs_score = #{snapshotCsScore,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, snapshot_level = #{snapshotLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, actual_exec_ms = #{actualExecMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, actual_reading_ms = #{actualReadingMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, is_batch_fill = #{isBatchFill,jdbcType=INTEGER}, focus_out_count = #{focusOutCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, filtered_time_ms = #{filteredTimeMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, total_time_ms = #{totalTimeMs,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
